title: ardisia pellucida subsp. pectinata
intro: Ardisia pellucida subsp. pectinata is a subspecies of plant commonly known as the "nightshade" or "shining-leaf nightshade", belonging to the family Sapotaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ardisia pellucida subsp. pectinata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
